title: FPS Render
description: Showing FPS at left-top on screen
body:
**FPS Render has render FPS at left-top corner without FPS lost**

And it is how it's works:
![Gameplay with mod](https://github.com/I114rk/FPS-Render/blob/main/1.gif?raw=true)

The project has github woth open source [code](https://github.com/I114rk/FPS-Render/tree/main)

PROJECT HAS BEEN RELEASED

Instructions:
- Red - Lowest FPS (<20)
- Orange - Low FPS (>20<=40)
- Yellow - Normal FPS (>40<=80)
- Dark Green - High Normal FPS (>80<=120)
- Lime Green - High FPS (>120<=180)
- Blue - Highest FPS (>180<=240)
- Cyan (Light Blue) - Ultra FPS (>240<=300)
- Purple - Highest Ultra FPS (>300)
